name: LayersObserver
summary: This class is abstract. To implement this observer, create a Ruby class of this type, override the desired methods, and add an instance of the observer to the objects of interests. This observer interface is implemented to react to layers events.

methods.name: onCurrentLayerChanged
methods.summary: The #onCurrentLayerChanged method is called when the user selects a different active layer.
methods.remarks: The #onCurrentLayerChanged method is called when the user selects a different active layer.

methods.name: onLayerAdded
methods.summary: The #onLayerAdded method is called when a new layer is added to a model.
methods.remarks: The #onLayerAdded method is called when a new layer is added to a model.

methods.name: onLayerChanged
methods.summary: The #onLayerChanged method is called when a layer is changed.
methods.remarks: The #onLayerChanged method is called when a layer is changed.

methods.name: onLayerFolderAdded
methods.summary: The #onLayerFolderAdded method is called when a layer folder is added to a model.
methods.remarks: The #onLayerFolderAdded method is called when a layer folder is added to a model.

methods.name: onLayerFolderChanged
methods.summary: The #onLayerFolderChanged method is called when a layer folder changes one of its properties.
methods.remarks: The #onLayerFolderChanged method is called when a layer folder changes one of its properties.

methods.name: onLayerFolderRemoved
methods.summary: The #onLayerFolderRemoved method is called when a layer folder is removed from a model.
methods.remarks: The #onLayerFolderRemoved method is called when a layer folder is removed from a model.

methods.name: onLayerRemoved
methods.summary: The #onLayerRemoved method is called when a layer is removed from a model.
methods.remarks: The #onLayerRemoved method is called when a layer is removed from a model.

methods.name: onParentFolderChanged
methods.summary: Note: When a folder changes parent #onLayerFolderRemoved and #onLayerFolderAdded triggers.
methods.remarks: Note: When a folder changes parent #onLayerFolderRemoved and #onLayerFolderAdded triggers. The #onParentFolderChanged method is called when a layer changes parent folder.

methods.name: onRemoveAllLayers
methods.summary: The #onRemoveAllLayers method is called when all layer are removed from a model.
methods.remarks: The #onRemoveAllLayers method is called when all layer are removed from a model.
